versions.version_description: I added an important missing Chord the "G" in every second line

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: These are all basic chords if you use a capo on the first fret.

content:
Oookay.. I've looked at these versions, played them, and they still don't fit. 
Here's mine. See how it works.

INTRO:
A5 X 4 Em/G X 8 D/F# X 4
Do this twice
 
[tab]    [ch]A[/ch]                 [ch]Asus4[/ch]
how long before I get in [/tab]
[tab]           [ch]A7sus4[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
before it starts, before I begin [/tab]
[tab]    [ch]A[/ch]                 [ch]Asus4[/ch]
how long before you decide [/tab]
[tab]             [ch]A7sus4[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]
before I know what it feels like [/tab]
[tab]      [ch]A[/ch]                 [ch]Em[/ch]
where to, where do I go [/tab]
[tab]               [ch]A7sus4[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]
if you never tried then you'll never know [/tab]
[tab]    [ch]A[/ch]                    [ch]Em[/ch]
how long do I have to climb [/tab]
[tab]                [ch]A7sus4[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]
up on this side of this mountain of mine [/tab]

[ch]A5[/ch] [ch]Em/G[/ch] [ch]D/F#[/ch] [ch]A5[/ch] [ch]Em/G[/ch] [ch]D/F#[/ch]

[tab]     [ch]A[/ch]                   [ch]Asus4[/ch]
look up, I look up at night [/tab]
[tab]              [ch]A7sus4[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]
planets are moving at the speed of light [/tab]
[tab]     [ch]A[/ch]                [ch]Asus4[/ch]
come up, up in the trees [/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]A7sus4[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]
every chance that you get is a chance you seize [/tab]
[tab]    [ch]A[/ch]                [ch]Em[/ch]
how long am I can stand [/tab]
[tab]                             [ch]D[/ch]
with my head stuck under the sand [/tab]
[tab]     [ch]A[/ch]                    [ch]Em[/ch]
I'll start before I can stop [/tab]
[tab]                                      [ch]D[/ch]
or before I see things the right way up [/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]                   [ch]Bm[/ch]
   all that noise, all that sound [/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]                [ch]Bm[/ch]
  all those places that i got found [/tab]

CHORUS:
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]Bm[/ch]
and birds go flying at the speed of sound [/tab]
[tab]   [ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
to show how it all began [/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                          [ch]Bm[/ch]
birds come flying from the underground [/tab]
[tab]             [ch]F#m[/ch]                         [ch]G[/ch]
if you could see it then you'd understand [/tab]

[ch]A[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]

Verse 2:
 
[ch]A[/ch] x4 [ch]Asus4[/ch] x4 [ch]A7sus4[/ch] x4 [ch]D[/ch] x4
[ch]A[/ch] x4 [ch]Asus4[/ch] x4 [ch]A7sus4[/ch] x4 [ch]D[/ch] x4
[ch]A[/ch] x4 [ch]Em[/ch] x8 [ch]D[/ch] x4
[ch]A[/ch] x4 [ch]Em[/ch] x8 [ch]D[/ch] x4
[tab][ch]G[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]                   [ch]Bm[/ch]
   all that noise, all that sound [/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]                [ch]Bm[/ch]
  all those places that i got found [/tab]

CHORUS

[ch]D[/ch]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]                       [ch]Bm[/ch]
 all those signs   I knew what they meant [/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Ddim[/ch]
something you can't invent [/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]                  [ch]Bm[/ch]
 Some get made,  and some get sent[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ddim[/ch]
Ooooohhh.... [/tab]

CHORUS

[tab]            [ch]F#m[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]         
Oh when you see it then you'll understand[/tab]

I hope that's closer... more later from me if I get the chance.
